title: Player Action Request v1
description: A player-submitted request evaluated by the action policy engine. A request is never a direct actuator command (ADR-0003); the policy returns exactly one outcome and a reason. actionType values are the allowed set defined in docs/15_ACTION_CATALOG.md.

requestId.description: Producer-assigned unique id for this request.

playerId.description: Opaque public id of the player making the request.

leaseId.description: Opaque public id of the active lease that authorizes this action.

plotId.description: Opaque public id of the target plot.

cropCycleId.description: Opaque public id of the crop cycle the action applies to.

actionType.description: Stable action code. The allowed set is docs/15_ACTION_CATALOG.md §4 (categories A-D). lower_snake_case, English only (AGENTS.md §5). A value outside this enum fails contract validation; a value inside it may still be rejected by the policy engine with a reason.

parameters.description: Action-specific parameters (e.g. durationSeconds, mode). Kept as a free object for now; typed per-action shapes are a future refinement (docs/15_ACTION_CATALOG.md §6). Safety-sensitive values such as duration are always re-capped server-side, never trusted from here.

requestedAt.description: When the player submitted the request (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC).

idempotencyKey.description: Client-supplied retry key. A repeated key MUST NOT create a duplicate command or work order (AGENTS.md §8).
